questions.question: What three primitives does an MCP server expose?
questions.questionZh: MCP 服务器公开哪三个原语（primitives）？
optionsZh: 智能体 (Agent)、技能 (Skill) 与工作流 (Workflow)

questions.question: What wire format does MCP use?
questions.questionZh: MCP 使用什么线路格式 (wire format)？

questions.question: Which metadata field signals a tool mutates state and should require human approval?
questions.questionZh: 哪个元数据字段（metadata field）用于标识工具（tool）会修改状态（mutates state），且需要人工审批（human approval）？

questions.question: What is the 2025-06-18 transport that replaced the earlier SSE-only remote transport?
questions.questionZh: 取代早期仅支持 SSE（Server-Sent Events）的远程传输 (remote transport) 机制的 2025-06-18 传输机制 (transport) 是什么？
optionsZh: 可流式传输的 HTTP (Streamable HTTP)

questions.question: When should a tool be split into its own MCP server instead of staying inline?
questions.questionZh: 何时应将工具拆分为独立的 MCP 服务器（MCP server），而不是保持内联（inline）？
options: When it is called fewer than 10 times per day
When it is called from two or more hosts and is read-only/cacheable
When it returns more than 1KB of data
Never; MCP is only for local dev
optionsZh: 当每日调用次数少于 10 次时
当从两个或多个主机（hosts）调用，且其为只读（read-only）/可缓存（cacheable）时
当其返回的数据超过 1KB 时
绝不；模型上下文协议（MCP）仅用于本地开发。
